violations.text: Food items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Walk in cooler was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS Food items Voluntarily disposed of. Sauerkraut, ham, cheese, pasta sauce, turkey, ground beef, Feta cheese, and grape leaves all 48DF. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025
Deli meat, deli cheese, and pasta salad was observed held past date of disposition. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

Food items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The drains in the walk in cooler are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
